_comment: Line relief via the orders queue (phase 3): a tired, thinned player infantry line holds an engaged enemy while a fresh unit waits behind it. The player box-selects the fresh unit and right-clicks the engaged friendly -- a RELIEF order: the fresh unit advances THROUGH its tired ally (the swap's pass-through exemption lives on the order) and takes over the fight, while the tired unit gets a queue-visible MOVE order and peels back to the rear. Record the movie at fixed_fps 60 so the step ticks line up with the 60/s headless state dump. State dumps verify the orders by exact value: pre-click the tired unit is FIGHTING with no order; post-click the reliever's current_order is RELIEF and the tired unit's is MOVE; late, the fresh unit fights in the line's place and the tired one stands clear behind it.
